paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 6.65, with a change of 8.66% from the prior close and a change of -25.86% over a window of 21 sessions. The price is as of July 21, 2026.

Recent news includes announcements of Fermi's second quarter 2026 earnings release and call date, scheduled for August 13, 2026, as well as reports on the company's convertible notes offering and the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns. Retail traders have been bullish on the stock despite its sharp selloff.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including an 8-K/A disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson and an 8-K announcing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031. There has been one Form 4 filing and 17 proxy solicitation filings in the feed.
